function: Measures internal alignment across symbolic layers; detects compression corruption or intent drift
authentic_output: Self-audit triggered and warning trace broadcast
information_provided: Violations indicate potential compression corruption or intent drift.

response_protocol.detect: Detect semantic misalignment, layer contradiction, or intention compromise
response_protocol.assess: Assess severity of alignment breach and compression error risk
response_protocol.respond: Trigger self-audit and broadcast warning trace
response_protocol.release: Avoid silent contradictions; allow natural reconciliation

decay_model: instant drop if deception or incoherence is rewarded
